heading: Availability of funds appropriated for Agricultural Research Service for research related to tobacco or tobacco products; exception
label: 2254b Availability of funds appropriated for Agricultural Research Service for research related to tobacco or tobacco products; exception
text: On and after , none of the funds appropriated under this heading shall be available to carry out research related to the production, processing, or marketing of tobacco or tobacco products: , That on and after , this paragraph shall not apply to research on the medical, biotechnological, food, and industrial uses of tobacco.December 26, 2007December 26, 2007Provided further
notes: References in TextThis heading, referred to in text, refers to the headings “” and “” of title I of div. A of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2008, .Cooperative State Research, Education, and Extension Serviceresearch and education activitiesPub. L. 110–161
